description: Create the IntelligentAgent base class that replaces naive WorkerAgent inheritance with LLM-driven planning loop (observe -> plan -> propose-actions -> request-permission -> execute -> reflect). This is the foundation all pilots will extend.
steps: Create packages/agent-runtime/src/ai-engine.interface.ts defining the AIEnginePort interface (dependency injection boundary so pilots don't import @quant/ai directly). Interface should have: infer(prompt, systemPrompt, options) => Promise<{content: string, usage: {tokens: number, cost: number}}>, classify(text, categories) => Promise<{category: string, confidence: number}>, embed(text) => Promise<number[]>

Create packages/agent-runtime/src/intelligent-agent.ts that extends WorkerAgent. Constructor takes AIEnginePort + TypedToolRegistry + SpendingLimit via DI. Implements the planning loop: (1) observe - gather context from task params, (2) plan - call AI to generate an AgentPlan using available tools, (3) propose-actions - emit proposed actions list, (4) request-permission - check if actions above READ_LOW need approval via ApprovalQueue, (5) execute - run actions via ExecutionEngine, (6) reflect - AI evaluates result quality and logs reasoning trace. Each step emits an OpenTelemetry-style trace event (as a typed record, no OTel SDK dependency needed) that stores {phase, input, output, durationMs, tokenCost}.
Add a getReasoningTrace() method that returns the full decision log for 'explain why' UI feature
Add a redoWithFeedback(feedback: string) method that re-runs the reflect->plan loop with user feedback injected
Add idle timeout logic: if agent stays in WAITING_APPROVAL state > 24 hours, auto-transition to IDLE (auto-park)
Add cost preview: before executing, compute estimated cost from plan steps and expose via getCostPreview() => CostEstimate
Update packages/agent-runtime/src/index.ts to export IntelligentAgent and AIEnginePort

Create packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/intelligent-agent.test.ts with tests: (1) full planning loop with mocked AI engine produces correct trace, (2) spending limit blocks execution when budget exceeded, (3) approval queue gates high-risk actions, (4) redoWithFeedback re-plans with new context, (5) idle timeout auto-parks agent, (6) cost preview matches plan estimate
acceptance_criteria: IntelligentAgent class compiles and exports from package
Planning loop phases (observe, plan, propose, permission, execute, reflect) all emit trace events
AI engine is called via injected interface, not directly imported
Spending limit enforcement blocks execution when budget exceeded
All new tests pass with mocked AI engine
TypedToolRegistry is used for tool discovery - no string-matched intents
findings: All 324 tests pass (12 new). Typecheck and lint clean. The IntelligentAgent class uses the existing state machine transitions. The idle timeout test uses vi.useFakeTimers + vi.advanceTimersByTime + checkIdleTimeout() to test the 24h auto-park. Pre-commit prettier reformatted files.
